description: A candid press-conference photograph (a still/screen capture from a livestream, including a small sign-language interpreter inset window in the lower-right corner). It depicts a man in a dark three-piece suit with a red-and-white striped tie and an American-flag lapel pin standing at a wooden podium with microphones, speaking. Behind him on a blue pleated curtain backdrop is a partially visible banner reading 'VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT' and a phone number '855-48...'. Flanking him stand several people, including DHS Secretary Kristi Noem (at left) and family members of victims holding framed photographs of deceased loved ones (a framed portrait of a man in dress uniform at lower left; a framed photo of a girl at a birthday cake at right). The tweet describes Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons hosting a press conference announcing the reopening of the VOICE Office. This is a documentary event photo with only incidental backdrop text, not a purpose-designed graphic.
notable_text: VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT; 855-48-... (backdrop banner only)
